overview: OC Integrative Medicine combines conventional and functional medicine to identify and address root causes of health conditions, with specialization in gut healing, hormonal balance, and metabolic restoration.
highlights: Root-cause assessment of gut, hormonal, and metabolic health
Advanced testing with natural treatment and lifestyle modification protocols
Weight loss and chronic condition management support
targetAudience: People with digestive issues, chronic fatigue, brain fog, and those seeking functional medicine approaches to hormonal and metabolic health.
